name: Glintscale Flyer
reasoning: V2 best balances all criteria. It features a lean, graceful drake with proper anatomy, iridescent blue scales with silver highlights, and wings spread wide in mid-flight. The composition is clean and readable at card size with excellent focal point. The cool teal/steel-blue palette with warm orange machinery glow in the background perfectly matches the prompt's post-apocalyptic sci-fi aesthetic. V1 is too photorealistic and bulky (not lean enough), while V3 has awkward anatomy with oversized claws and a less elegant pose.

artifacts_found.issue: Too photorealistic and lacks stylized digital illustration quality; drake appears too bulky/muscular rather than lean and graceful
Anatomy issues: oversized claws and feet appear disproportionate; less elegant pose; darker overall tone reduces iridescent shimmer effect
